videoSnippet.title: "He Premoved an Entire Classical Game" || Nepo vs Hans || UzChess Cup 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Nepomniachtchi, Ian (2733) - Niemann, Hans Moke (2742)
3rd UzChess Cup 2026 | Masters (Chess.com) [08] 2026.06.14
C88 Ruy Lopez, closed, anti-Marshall 8.a4

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bb5 a6 4.Ba4 Nf6 5.O-O Be7 6.Re1 b5 7.Bb3 O-O 8.a4 b4 9.d4 d6 10.dxe5 Nxe5 11.Nxe5 dxe5 12.Qxd8 Rxd8 13.Nd2 Bc5 14.Nf3 Ng4 15.Be3 Bxe3 16.fxe3 Rd6 17.Bd5 c6 18.Bb3 Be6 19.Rad1 Rad8 20.Rxd6 Rxd6 21.Bxe6 fxe6 22.Kf1 Nf6 23.Ke2 Nxe4 24.Rd1 Rd5 25.Rxd5 exd5 26.Nxe5 c5 27.Kf3 Kf8 28.Nc6 Ke8 29.Nb8 Kd8 30.Nxa6 Kc8 31.Kf4 Kb7 32.Ke5 Kxa6 33.Kxd5 Nf6+ 34.Kxc5 Ng4 35.e4 Nxh2 36.Kxb4 Ng4 37.Kc5 h5 38.Kd4 Ka5 39.b3 Nf6 40.e5 Ng8 41.e6 h4 42.Ke4 Ne7 43.Kf4 Kb6 44.Kg5 Kc6 45.a5 Kd6 46.a6 Nc8 47.Kxh4 Kxe6 48.Kg5 Kf7 49.Kf5 Na7 50.g4 g6+ 51.Ke4
